
Reference Points {data-navmenu="Model"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Yield Curves

```{r yield_curves, eval=has_refcrv}
mv_plot_refcurves(
  ref_curves = mv$ref_curves,
  ref_points = mv$ref_points,
  title      = "Equilibrium Reference Curves"
)
```

### Kobe Plot

```{r kobe_plot, eval=has_refpts && !is.null(mv$ref_points$SBmsy) && !is.null(mv$ref_points$lUmsy)}
# Sum SB and HR across areas so the trajectory has one point per year and
# connects chronologically rather than zig-zagging between areas.
sb_yr    <- tapply(mv$spawning_biomass$est, mv$spawning_biomass$year, sum, na.rm = TRUE)
hr_yr    <- tapply(mv$legal_hr$est,         mv$legal_hr$year,         sum, na.rm = TRUE)
kobe_yrs <- sort(as.integer(names(sb_yr)))
b_ratio  <- as.numeric(sb_yr[as.character(kobe_yrs)]) / mv$ref_points$SBmsy
u_ratio  <- as.numeric(hr_yr[as.character(kobe_yrs)]) / mv$ref_points$lUmsy

# Build Kobe with equilibrium SSB curve in background
kc <- modelVis::mv_kobe_colours()
df <- data.frame(
  year = kobe_yrs,
  b = b_ratio, f = u_ratio,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

x_max <- max(c(df$b, 2), na.rm = TRUE) * 1.2
y_max <- max(c(df$f, 2), na.rm = TRUE) * 1.2

shapes <- list(
  list(type = "rect", x0 = 1, x1 = x_max,
       y0 = 0, y1 = 1,
       fillcolor = kc["green"], layer = "below",
       line = list(width = 0)),
  list(type = "rect", x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
       y0 = 1, y1 = y_max,
       fillcolor = kc["red"], layer = "below",
       line = list(width = 0)),
  list(type = "rect", x0 = 1, x1 = x_max,
       y0 = 1, y1 = y_max,
       fillcolor = kc["yellow_top"], layer = "below",
       line = list(width = 0)),
  list(type = "rect", x0 = 0, x1 = 1,
       y0 = 0, y1 = 1,
       fillcolor = kc["yellow_right"], layer = "below",
       line = list(width = 0))
)

p <- plot_ly()

# Equilibrium SSB curve in background (if ref_curves)
if (has_refcrv && !is.null(mv$ref_curves$legalU) &&
    !is.null(mv$ref_curves$biomass)) {
  rc <- mv$ref_curves
  # Filter feasible and convert to relative
  feas <- rc$legalU >= 0 & rc$biomass >= 0
  rc_feas <- rc[feas, , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(rc_feas) > 0 &&
      !is.null(mv$ref_points$SBmsy) &&
      !is.null(mv$ref_points$lUmsy)) {
    eq_b <- rc_feas$biomass / mv$ref_points$SBmsy
    eq_u <- rc_feas$legalU / mv$ref_points$lUmsy
    p <- add_lines(
      p = p,
      x = eq_b, y = eq_u,
      line = list(
        color = "rgba(150,150,150,0.3)", width = 2
      ),
      showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip"
    )
  }
}

# Trajectory — use add_trace(mode="lines") not add_lines(); add_lines() sorts
# by x before drawing, which collapses the temporal path into a monotone curve.
p <- add_trace(
  p = p,
  type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
  x = df$b, y = df$f,
  line = list(color = "#333333", width = 1),
  showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip"
)

# Year markers
p <- add_markers(
  p = p,
  x = df$b, y = df$f,
  marker = list(
    color = "#333333", size = 4,
    line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
  ),
  text = df$year,
  hovertemplate = paste0(
    "Year: %{text}<br>SB/SBmsy: %{x:.2f}<br>",
    "U/Umsy: %{y:.2f}<extra></extra>"
  ),
  showlegend = FALSE
)

# Terminal year star
n <- nrow(df)
p <- add_markers(
  p = p,
  x = df$b[n], y = df$f[n],
  marker = list(
    color = "#d62728", size = 10,
    symbol = "star",
    line = list(color = "white", width = 1)
  ),
  name = as.character(df$year[n]),
  showlegend = FALSE,
  hovertemplate = paste0(
    df$year[n], "<br>SB/SBmsy: %{x:.2f}<br>",
    "U/Umsy: %{y:.2f}<extra></extra>"
  )
)

lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "SB / SBmsy"
lay$yaxis$title <- "U / Umsy"
lay$title <- "Kobe Phase Plot"
lay$shapes <- shapes
lay$showlegend <- FALSE
p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### Status Distributions

```{r status_dists, eval=has_mcmc && has_refpts && !is.null(mv$ref_points$SBmsy) && !is.null(mv$ref_points$lUmsy)}
sb_all  <- mv$spawning_biomass
hr_all  <- mv$legal_hr
yr_max  <- max(years)

# Aggregate across areas/stocks for terminal year
sb_term_est <- sum(sb_all$est[sb_all$year == yr_max], na.rm = TRUE)
hr_term_est <- mean(hr_all$est[hr_all$year == yr_max], na.rm = TRUE)

b_est <- sb_term_est / mv$ref_points$SBmsy
u_est <- hr_term_est / mv$ref_points$lUmsy

# Uncertainty bounds (only present when MCMC lwr/upr were populated)
has_ci <- "lwr" %in% names(sb_all) && any(!is.na(sb_all$lwr))
if (has_ci) {
  sb_term_lwr <- sum(sb_all$lwr[sb_all$year == yr_max], na.rm = TRUE)
  sb_term_upr <- sum(sb_all$upr[sb_all$year == yr_max], na.rm = TRUE)
  hr_term_lwr <- mean(hr_all$lwr[hr_all$year == yr_max], na.rm = TRUE)
  hr_term_upr <- mean(hr_all$upr[hr_all$year == yr_max], na.rm = TRUE)
  b_lwr <- sb_term_lwr / mv$ref_points$SBmsy
  b_upr <- sb_term_upr / mv$ref_points$SBmsy
  u_lwr <- hr_term_lwr / mv$ref_points$lUmsy
  u_upr <- hr_term_upr / mv$ref_points$lUmsy
}

p <- plot_ly()

# Crosshair segments (only when CI available)
if (has_ci) {
  p <- add_trace(
    p = p, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    x = c(b_lwr, b_upr), y = c(u_est, u_est),
    line = list(color = "#333333", width = 2),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hovertemplate = "B/Bmsy 95% CI: %{x:.2f}<extra></extra>"
  )
  p <- add_trace(
    p = p, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    x = c(b_est, b_est), y = c(u_lwr, u_upr),
    line = list(color = "#333333", width = 2),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hovertemplate = "U/Umsy 95% CI: %{y:.2f}<extra></extra>"
  )
}

# Median point
p <- add_markers(
  p = p,
  x = b_est, y = u_est,
  marker = list(
    color = "black", size = 8
  ),
  showlegend = FALSE,
  hovertemplate = paste0(
    "B/Bmsy: %{x:.2f}<br>U/Umsy: %{y:.2f}",
    "<extra></extra>"
  )
)

# Reference lines
status_shapes <- list(
  list(type = "line", x0 = 0.4, x1 = 0.4,
       y0 = 0, y1 = 1, yref = "paper",
       line = list(color = "#d62728", width = 1.5,
                   dash = "dash")),
  list(type = "line", x0 = 0.8, x1 = 0.8,
       y0 = 0, y1 = 1, yref = "paper",
       line = list(color = "#ff7f0e", width = 1.5,
                   dash = "dash")),
  list(type = "line", x0 = 1, x1 = 1,
       y0 = 0, y1 = 1, yref = "paper",
       line = list(color = "#2ca02c", width = 1.5,
                   dash = "dash")),
  list(type = "line",
       x0 = 0, x1 = 1, xref = "paper",
       y0 = 1, y1 = 1,
       line = list(color = "#d62728", width = 1.5,
                   dash = "dash"))
)

# Status annotations
ann_text <- paste0(
  "B/Bmsy = ", round(x = b_est, digits = 2),
  "<br>U/Umsy = ", round(x = u_est, digits = 2)
)
status_ann <- list(list(
  x = 0.98, y = 0.98,
  xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
  text = ann_text,
  showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "right",
  yanchor = "top",
  font = list(size = 11),
  bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)",
  bordercolor = "#cccccc", borderwidth = 1
))

lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "B / Bmsy"
lay$yaxis$title <- "U / Umsy"
lay$title <- paste("Stock Status", max(years))
lay$shapes <- status_shapes
lay$annotations <- status_ann
p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```
